snippets.description: Additive nullable coupon_id FK on orders, mirroring deal_id (NO ACTION on delete).
drizzle-kit-generated migration (never hand-written): additive column + NO ACTION FK.
snippets.content: ALTER TABLE "orders" ADD COLUMN "coupon_id" uuid; ALTER TABLE "orders" ADD CONSTRAINT "orders_coupon_id_coupons_id_fk" FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES "public"."coupons"("id") ON DELETE no action ON UPDATE no action;

snippets.description: couponId is the ONLY coupon input accepted (optional uuid). No discount amount is ever accepted from the client.
snippets.content: // Optional applied coupon (Phase 2). Same server-authority rule: only an id is accepted; the real discount is derived from the coupon's linked reward/deal. couponId: z.string().uuid().optional(),

snippets.description: Coupon lock+validate: FOR UPDATE lock acquired AFTER the deal lock (consistent lock ordering); owner 403, status!=available 409, expired 409; discount derived server-side from linked reward (fixed/percentage/free_item base-price) or deal (computeDealDiscountCents), each individually clamped to [0, subtotal].
snippets.content: const [coupon] = await tx.select().from(coupons).where(eq(coupons.id, body.couponId)).for('update'); ... couponDiscountCents = Math.max(0, Math.min(couponDiscountCents, subtotalCents));

snippets.description: Sum-clamp invariant: combined = min(deal + coupon, subtotal); discount_total AND total both derive from the SAME clamped value → subtotal - discount_total === total always holds in the persisted row.

Coupon consumed exactly once: CAS UPDATE coupons SET status='used' WHERE id=? AND status='available', AFTER the order insert in the SAME transaction; 0 rows → throw 409 → whole tx (order + coupon) rolls back.
snippets.content: const marked = await tx.update(coupons).set({ status: 'used', used_at: new Date() }).where(and(eq(coupons.id, body.couponId), eq(coupons.status, 'available'))).returning(); if (marked.length === 0) { throw new OrderError(409, 'Coupon is no longer available'); }

snippets.description: POST /coupons/:id/redeem uses an atomic CAS (no SELECT-then-UPDATE TOCTOU): WHERE id AND user_id AND status='available' AND not-expired; 0 rows → follow-up reads distinguish 404/403/409.
snippets.content: await db.update(coupons).set({ status: 'used', used_at: now }).where(and(eq(coupons.id, couponId), eq(coupons.user_id, userId), eq(coupons.status, 'available'), or(isNull(coupons.expires_at), gt(coupons.expires_at, now)))).returning();

snippets.description: serializeCoupon signature UNCHANGED (still consumed by POST /rewards/:id/redeem). New serializeCouponWithLabel wraps it additively with a derived displayLabel from the joined deal/reward.
snippets.content: export function serializeCouponWithLabel(coupon, deal, reward): ApiCouponWithLabel { return { ...serializeCoupon(coupon), displayLabel }; }
